message:
fix(once_cell): retry CAS loop after cancelled initializer in get_or_init

The OnceCell get_or_init and get_or_init_async methods had a bug where
waiters would panic or reach unreachable!() after a prior initializer
was cancelled (bd-ar5hz). When InitGuard is dropped without completion,
state resets to UNINIT, but waiters would wake and not re-check.

Changes:
- Convert single CAS attempt into retry loop for get_or_init (blocking)
  and get_or_init_async: wrap FnOnce in Option for at-most-once
  consumption, check is_initialized() after waiting, loop on UNINIT
- Refactor InitGuard to hold &OnceCell<T> instead of &AtomicU8, so its
  Drop impl can both reset state AND wake all waiters (cvar + async)
  preventing permanent waiter hangs after cancellation
- Update get_or_try_init_async: remove manual wake_all after guard drop
  since InitGuard::drop now handles it
- Same retry-loop pattern applied to get_or_init_async for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
